notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: GetManagedInstance, ListManagedInstances, and UpdateManagedInstance are present in v65.110.0. CreateManagedInstance and DeleteManagedInstance are not exposed, and both GetManagedInstanceResponse and UpdateManagedInstanceResponse return a ManagedInstance body without a work-request identifier.

Pinned provider coverage is unconfirmed. formal/sources.lock still points at github.com/oracle/terraform-provider-oci@eb653febb1bab4cc6650a96d404a8baf36fdf671, but the accessible local provider inventory did not expose a checked-in ManagedInstance resource or data source. The providerResource and datasource names therefore stay provisional OCI-style placeholders so generator-owned registry artifacts can derive stable links without claiming verified provider coverage.

Repo-authored runtime contract is narrower than the visible SDK surface: the published kind is bind-existing plus update-only, binds by explicit id or a unique ListManagedInstances match on compartmentId plus displayName with optional pluginStatus narrowing, updates only configuration, and treats CR delete as local unbind without calling OCI delete helpers.

Visible WLMS mutation responses expose neither lifecycle state nor work-request tracking for ManagedInstance. The reviewed runtime therefore uses a bounded read-after-write confirmation pass on the next reconcile instead of inventing waiter semantics.
